stainProtocols.name: Pittsburgh H&E
stainProtocols.description:
Derived from Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen AEC (Red); Nova red chromogen. 
Will switch from manual to automated staining with DAB chromogen in about 2 months. Standard histology.

stainProtocols.name: Pittsburgh amyloid beta (unknown)
stainProtocols.description:
Derived from Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen AEC (Red); Nova red chromogen. 
Will switch from manual to automated staining with DAB chromogen in about 2 months. Survey: NAB228

stainProtocols.name: Pittsburgh tau (PHF1)
stainProtocols.description:
Derived from Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen AEC (Red); Nova red chromogen. 
Will switch from manual to automated staining with DAB chromogen in about 2 months. Survey: PHF1 Peter Davies

stainProtocols.name: Pittsburgh alpha-synuclein (LB509)
stainProtocols.description:
Derived from Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen AEC (Red); Nova red chromogen. 
Will switch from manual to automated staining with DAB chromogen in about 2 months. Survey: Non-phospho specific LB509

stainProtocols.name: Pittsburgh TDP-43 (1D3)
stainProtocols.description:
Derived from Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen AEC (Red); Nova red chromogen. 
Will switch from manual to automated staining with DAB chromogen in about 2 months. Survey: Phospho-specific 1D3

stainProtocols.name: Pittsburgh silver (Bielschowsky)
stainProtocols.description:
Derived from Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen AEC (Red); Nova red chromogen. 
Will switch from manual to automated staining with DAB chromogen in about 2 months. Survey label: Silver stain; mapped to Bielschowsky in Pitt schema.

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Posterior hippocampus
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, TDP-43, Silver, P62 added for FTLD/ALS; Alpha synuclein added when screening sections positive. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Anterior cingulate
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, Alpha synuclein added when screening section positive. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Amygdala
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, TDP-43. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Midbrain
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Pons
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Medulla
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, TDP added for FTLD/ALS cases. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Frontal gyrus
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, Silver, Alpha synuclein added when screening sections positive. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Temporal lobe
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, Silver, Alpha synuclein added when screening sections positive. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Parietal gyrus
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, Silver, Alpha synuclein added if screening sections positive. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Visual cortex (occipital)
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, Silver, Alpha synuclein added when screening sections positive. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated). Survey landmarks: Line of Gennari (BA17), BA18.

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Striatum (basal ganglia)
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated). Survey landmarks: Anterior Commissure, Nucleus Basalis of Meynert, Globus Pallidus, Caudate, Internal Capsule, External Capsule, Putamen, Nucleus Accumbens, 2 sections taken, at level of accumbens and at level of anterior commissure.
landmarks: 2 sections taken, at level of accumbens and at level of anterior commissure

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Thalamus
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Cerebellum
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau, p62 and synuclein added as needed. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Pittsburgh — Central gyri (motor cortex)
regionProtocols.description: From Pittsburgh ADRC Neuropath Survey (Jun 9, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, TDP and tau staining done as needed for FTLD and CTE cases. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

notes: P62 / CD68 / other survey stains may not have Pitt schema stain types — see region descriptions.
Antibody fields that only say phospho/non-phospho are resolved from vendor/clone columns.
Regions marked Not Collected in the survey are omitted.
